summary: One material edge case remains in the s3b fix: `promptPath` is only existence-checked before being threaded into `claude`, so some bad 200 responses still launch a broken orchestrated session.

findings.title: `existsSync()` does not prove the returned `promptPath` is a readable regular file
findings.recommendation: Tighten the guard before setting `orchestrated`: verify the returned path is a readable regular file, e.g. `statSync(path).isFile()` plus `accessSync(path, fs.constants.R_OK)`, and fall back to a bare session otherwise. Add a regression for an existing directory or unreadable file returned from `/api/orchestrator/place`.
